assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 18-22 show: 'git checkout TC-9005' followed by 'git pull', then 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. The plan explicitly checks out TC-9005 (the feature branch) before creating the task branch, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 96-109 show: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 ...' and explicitly states 'The --base TC-9005 flag ensures the PR targets the feature branch, not main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 24-29 show: 'git checkout -b TC-9205' and explicitly states 'The task branch is named TC-9205 (the task issue ID), which is distinct from TC-9005 (the feature branch it is based on).'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 33-47 list all three files for pre-modification inspection: 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' (line 35), 'migration/src/lib.rs' (line 37), and 'entity/src/advisory.rs' (line 39). Additionally, file-1-description.md (lines 9-11) and file-2-description.md (lines 9-15) include explicit 'Pre-implementation Inspection' sections referencing these files.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 79 shows: 'git commit --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code" -m "refactor(migration): ..."'

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 67-75 show the commit message: 'refactor(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' (Conventional Commits format with type 'refactor', scope 'migration', and description). The footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 9 and 14-15 explicitly state: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch, NOT main)' and 'The **Target Branch** section specifies TC-9005. This is a feature branch (the parent feature issue ID), not main. All branch operations and the PR must target this feature branch.'
